skills.name: Forgein
skills.description: The full Forgein toolkit: skill optimizer, memory manager, and security checker in one command.
skills.author: forgein-ai

skills.name: Vibe Sec
skills.description: Security vibe check on staged git changes or any file/directory. Catches secrets, injection, path traversal, XSS, SSRF, and more.
skills.author: forgein-ai

skills.name: Claude Mem
skills.description: CRUD for Claude's auto-memory system. List, search, add, prune stale entries, and audit the memory index.
skills.author: forgein-ai

skills.name: Code Review
skills.description: Multi-dimensional code review across bugs, performance, security, and style. Runs parallel reviewers and ranks findings by severity.
skills.author: forgein-ai

skills.name: Smart Commit
skills.description: Generates conventional commit messages from staged changes with automatic scope detection and breaking-change flagging.
skills.author: forgein-ai

skills.name: Standup
skills.description: Generates a daily standup from git log, open PRs, and in-progress tasks. Done / doing / blocked format.
skills.author: forgein-ai

skills.name: PR Monitor
skills.description: Checks CI status across all your open PRs across repos. Flags failures that need attention vs. known-unfixable infrastructure checks.
skills.author: forgein-ai

skills.name: Test Gen
skills.description: Generates unit and integration tests for a function or file. Detects framework (pytest, jest, go test) and writes idiomatic tests with edge cases.
skills.author: forgein-ai

skills.name: Explain Codebase
skills.description: Onboards a new contributor to a codebase. Maps architecture, entry points, data flow, and key abstractions from a fresh read of the repo.
skills.author: forgein-ai

skills.name: Changelog
skills.description: Generates a CHANGELOG.md section from git log between two tags or since the last release. Groups by feat/fix/breaking.
skills.author: forgein-ai
